title: The Apartment Across the Street
content: Every evening, Daniel noticed a light turning on in the apartment across the street at exactly the same time. Strangely, he never saw anyone enter or leave the building. Curious, he began observing from his balcony while reading after work. The routine never changed. Eventually, he mentioned it to the building manager, who laughed and explained the mystery. The apartment belonged to a photographer who spent most of the year traveling. Before every trip, she programmed smart lights to switch on automatically each evening to make the home appear occupied. What had seemed mysterious was simply a clever security precaution.
